metadata.description: Local marketplace for personal Claude Code plugins.

plugins.name: ai-pathfinder
plugins.description: Long-running, multi-agent coding workflow with a live per-task HTML dashboard and a self-growing project knowledge base. /feature drives work on an existing codebase; /new-product creates a greenfield product from scratch via a PRD and an evolutionary build-loop; /improve surveys an app with a swarm of analysts, reaches consensus on the best improvements, lets the human pick, and fans them out as parallel /feature runs.
